productDisplayName: Puma Men Navy Blue & White Graphic T-shirt
description: Style NoteStructured tee from puma for the summer - you can't get cooler (literally and figuratively) than this. Play up the brand's sporty vibe and style this with slim cut cotton trousers and a washed leather jacket. Match the colour of the trousers with the jacket (keep it tonal) and pair this with a no-fuss style pair of sneakers.Product DetailsBlue and white T-shirt, has a round neckline, branding and graphic print in front, graphic print on the left side at the back and short sleevesMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash Use cold ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
